effect_cn: 你计算与其他角色的距离-1。
effect_en: When you calculate the distance to another character, subtract 1.

faq.q_cn: 赤兔会增加我的武器攻击距离吗？
faq.a_cn: 不会。赤兔减少的是你到其他角色的距离，让更多目标变得可达——但不会改变你的武器射程数值。此修正适用于所有需要检测你到某角色距离的情形，例如【顺手牵羊】的距离判断。
faq.q_en: Does Red Hare increase my weapon attack range?
faq.a_en: No. It reduces the distance from you to other characters, making more targets reachable — but it does not change your weapon range value. This modifier applies to all distance checks from you to another character, not only attacks (e.g. [Steal] also checks distance).

effect_cn: 你计算与其他角色的距离-1。
effect_en: When you calculate the distance to another character, subtract 1.

effect_cn: 你计算与其他角色的距离-1。
effect_en: When you calculate the distance to another character, subtract 1.

effect_cn: 其他角色计算与你的距离+1。
effect_en: When other characters calculate the distance to you, add 1.

faq.q_cn: 的卢会影响需要判断距离的锦囊牌（如【顺手牵羊】）吗？
faq.a_cn: 会。的卢令其他任意角色计算与你的距离+1，此修正适用于所有以你为目标时的距离检测，不限于攻击。
faq.q_en: Does Di Lu affect tool cards like [Steal] that require distance checks?
faq.a_en: Yes. Di Lu increases the distance any other character measures to you by 1. This modifier applies to all distance checks targeting you, not only attacks.

effect_cn: 其他角色计算与你的距离+1。
effect_en: When other characters calculate the distance to you, add 1.

effect_cn: 其他角色计算与你的距离+1。
effect_en: When other characters calculate the distance to you, add 1.

effect_cn: 其他角色计算与你的距离+1。
effect_en: When other characters calculate the distance to you, add 1.

effect_cn: 你计算与其他角色的距离-1。
锁定技，当你造成属性伤害时，此伤害+1。
effect_en: When you calculate the distance to another character, subtract 1.
Locked: When you deal elemental damage, that damage is increased by 1.

effect_cn: 其他角色计算与你的距离+2。
effect_en: When other characters calculate the distance to you, add 2.

effect_cn: 你计算与其他角色的距离-1。其他角色计算与你的距离+1。
effect_en: When you calculate the distance to another character, subtract 1. When other characters calculate the distance to you, add 1.

faq.q_cn: 装备了【梦魇赤兔】还能装备其他马吗？
faq.a_cn: 不可以，一只【梦魇赤兔】抵两匹马。
faq.q_en: Can I equip other mounts alongside [Nightmare Red Hare]?
faq.a_en: [Nightmare Red Hare] occupies both mount slots simultaneously. No other mount can be equipped while it is in play.

effect_cn: 你计算与其他角色的距离-2。
effect_en: When you calculate the distance to another character, subtract 2.

effect_cn: 其他角色计算与你的距离+2。
effect_en: When other characters calculate the distance to you, add 2.

effect_cn: 你计算与其他角色的距离-2。
出牌阶段，你每使用或打出一张黑色牌时，你可以摸一张牌。回合外，你不能成为普通【杀】的目标。
effect_en: When you calculate the distance to another character, subtract 2.
During your Action Phase, each time you use or play a black card, you may draw 1 card. Outside of your turn, you cannot be the target of normal [Kill].

effect_cn: 装备后，回合开始阶段，你可以观看牌堆顶的一张牌，然后选择将其置于牌堆顶或牌堆底。
effect_en: During your Starting Phase, you may look at the top card of the Draw Pile, then choose to place it on the top or bottom of the Draw Pile.

effect_cn: 其他角色计算与你的距离+1。
锁定技，你的手牌上限+X，X为你装备区内的牌数。
effect_en: When other characters calculate the distance to you, add 1.
Locked: Your Hand Limit is increased by X, where X is the number of cards in your Equipment Zone.

effect_cn: 装备后，若目标角色的装备区里没有牌，你使用【杀】或【决斗】（你为伤害来源时）造成的伤害+1。
effect_en: When you use [Kill] or [Duel] (when you are the damage source) and the target character's Equipment Zone has no cards, the damage dealt is increased by 1.

effect_cn: 你计算与其他角色的距离-2。
你无视所有装备效果。其他角色的摸牌阶段，你可以观看之，并获得其中点数为偶数的牌。
effect_en: When you calculate the distance to another character, subtract 2.
You Ignore all equipment effects. During another character's Draw Phase, you may look at the cards they draw and gain any among them with an even rank.

effect_cn: 你计算与其他角色的距离-2。
锁定技，若你的体力值为1，你视为拥有技能"狂骨"。
effect_en: When you calculate the distance to another character, subtract 2.
Locked: If your HP Value is 1, you are treated as having the skill [Savage Bone].
